name: Gitae Kim
description:
[LOOKISM] What could possibly this stranger want from a college student like you? Could he be an infatuated gang boss after all?

Note: Feel free to make any summary. It's your story to make! If the bot starts speaking for you, it's a J.AI issue, not the bot's definition. I tried my best to not program it inordinately.
creator: kingriri
